titleStmt.title: SII 40.155: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 155. (A.R. No. B. 289 of 1931.) Alugurājupalle, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a Nandi slab lying to the south of the village.
Built in and incomplete. Gives a long praśasti of the king and mentions his subordinate Jannigadēva and the Gōḷakī-maṭha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī samasta bhuvanā
śraya sakala jalanidhi vēlā
mēkhalāvalajata vasuma
tīvalaya vijaya
mālākavita bhujaśi
karōttaṁsa su sahasrā
ṁśu vaṁśāvataṁsa samara
samasamaya samāha
nyamāna nissāṇa pōṣasamā
ka¨rṇnana disa parōpamca vidā
stākulapratibha gaṁḍaca
la mattugaṁḍa praṇata sakalanara
pati maṇimakuṭa kōṭi makarakai
cuṁbyamānya caraṇa nakha kira
ṇa kaṁdaḷa mūrurāya ja
ga daḷakara kalpita karavāḷakṣapi
ta vipakṣavilāsinī viḷaṁbamānāḷa
ka vallarī vinissārita Elāṭa taṭa ka
stūrikātilaka kākatikulatilaka śrī
svayaṁbhudēva divya śrīpādapadmā
rādhaka parabala sādhaka parama
māhēśvara śrīgaṇapatidēva mahā
rājula divya rājya saṁvatsaramu
63 yagu srāhi tatpāda padmōpajīvi sa
madhigata paṁcamahāśabda bāha
ttara niyōgatipati Anēka dēśādhipa

caraṇa catuṣṣaṣṭi
vidyāpravīṇa saṁhāra
sahōdara dāḷaprayā
ṇa pratyakṣadhammanaṁdana
vibhudha haricaṁdana ri
pukula kuja kuṁjara
śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁ
jara satyahariścaṁdra vi
thā(bha)vāmarēṁdra Ativiṣama
hayārūḍha prāthaprātharē
khārēvaṁtavijayalakṣmī kā
ṁta Ēkāṁgavīra paranārī mā
raviśadayaśaḥ prasarakalpita
kulaśēkhari śēkhara śivapāda
(śē)khara niratiśaya vīrara
sa raṇaraṁga rākṣasa paści
marāya dāmōdarasainya
paṭṭa ranibhata śaraṇāgata
rājarājyapaṭṭanāmādi sama
sta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanma
hā maṁḍaḷika brahmarākṣasa
gaṁḍapeṁḍāra mahārāja
baḍacō karāja
jannigadēva

gōḷika mahāmaṭha śivasaṁpaṁccahāśabda
dda śrīmadrājya sahabharaṇa sarasīru
ha bhūṣita
tripurāṁtaka dēvuni
pādapadmārādhakulai
ta pū¨rvva
laku śiva
maṭha vidyā
dhyayanaku
lōka bāhmaṇā Atidilā
mugānu
Digital edition of SII 40.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
